```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> integer().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Graph = build_graph(nums, N),
    NumToIndices = build_num_to_indices(nums, N),
    PossibleKs = get_possible_ks(NumToIndices),
    Sorted = lists:sort(nums),
    find_max_k(PossibleKs, Graph, Sorted, N).

build_graph(nums, N) ->
    Graph = lists:map(fun(_) -> [] end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Idx, Acc) ->
            lists:foldl(
                fun(J, Acc2) ->
                    AndResult = erlang:bitwise_and(nums[Idx], nums[J]),
                    if
                        AndResult >= 0 ->
                            Graph1 = lists:map(
                                fun(I) ->
                                    case lists:member(J, Graph[I]) of
                                        true -> Graph[I];
                                        false -> [J | Graph[I]]
                                    end
                                end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
                                    Graph2 = lists:map(
                                        fun(I) ->
                                            case lists:member(Idx, Graph[I]) of
                                                true -> Graph[I];
                                                false -> [Idx | Graph[I]]
                                            end
                                        end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
                                    [Graph1 | Acc2];
                        true ->
                            Acc2
                    end
                end, Acc, lists:seq(Idx+1, N-1))
        end, Graph, lists:seq(0, N-1)).

build_num_to_indices(nums, N) ->
    NumToIndices = dict:from_list(
        lists:map(
            fun(Num) ->
                Indices = lists:filter(
                    fun(Idx) -> Num == nums[Idx] end,
                    lists:seq(0, N-1)),
                {Num, Indices}
            end, lists:seq(0, N-1))
    ),
    NumToIndices.

get_possible_ks(NumToIndices) ->
    PossibleKs = dict:keys(NumToIndices),
    lists:sort(PossibleKs).

find_max_k(PossibleKs, Graph, Sorted, N) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(K, Acc) ->
            Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
            CanSort = check_sort(K, Graph, Visited, Sorted, N),
            if
                CanSort -> K;
                true -> Acc
            end
        end, 0, lists:reverse(PossibleKs)).

check_sort(K, Graph, Visited, Sorted, N) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(Idx) ->
            case Visited[Idx] of
                true -> true;
                false ->
                    Q = queue:from_list([Idx]),
                    queue:foldl(
                        fun(Node, Acc) ->
                            lists:foreach(
                                fun(Neighbor) ->
                                    case Visited[Neighbor] of
                                        false ->
                                            Visited1 = lists:sublist_replace(Visited, true, Neighbor, 1),
                                            Visited2 = lists:sublist_replace(Visited1, true, Node, 1),
                                            queue:in(Neighbor, Q)
                                    end
                                end, Acc, Graph[Node])
                        end, true, Q)
            end
        end, true, lists:seq(0, N-1)) andalso
        lists:all(
            fun(Idx) ->
                nums[Idx] == Sorted[Idx]
            end, lists:seq(0, N-1)).
```

    Graph = lists:map(fun(_) -> [] end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Idx, Acc) ->
            lists:foldl(
                fun(Jdx, Acc2) ->
                    AndResult = erlang:bit_and(nums[Idx], nums[Jdx]),
                    if AndResult >= 0 ->
                        Graph1 = lists:sublist(Acc, Idx-1) ++ [Jdx | lists:sublist(Acc, Idx+1, N-Idx-1)],
                        Graph2 = lists:sublist(Acc2, Jdx-1) ++ [Idx | lists:sublist(Acc2, Jdx+1, N-Jdx-1)],
                        Graph2;
                    true ->
                        Acc2
                end, Acc, lists:seq(Idx+1, N-1))
        end, Graph, lists:seq(0, N-1)).

build_num_to_indices(nums, N) ->
    NumToIndices = dict:from_list(
        lists:foldl(
            fun(Value, Acc) ->
                Indices = lists:map(fun(I) -> I end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
                dict:store(Value, Indices, Acc)
            end, dict:new(), nums)
    ),

get_possible_ks(NumToIndices) ->
    PossibleKs = dict:keys(NumToIndices),
    lists:sort(PossibleKs).

find_max_k(PossibleKs, Sorted, Graph, N) ->

        lists:filter(
            fun(K) ->
                can_sort(K, Sorted, Graph, N)
            end, PossibleKs)
    ).

can_sort(K, Sorted, Graph, N) ->
    Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            case lists:member(I, Visited) of
                true -> true;
                false ->
                    Q = queue:from_list([I]),
                    queue:foldl(
                        fun(Node, Acc) ->
                            lists:all(
                                fun(Neighbor) ->
                                    case lists:member(Neighbor, Visited) of
                                        true -> true;
                                        false ->
                                            Visited1 = lists:sublist(Visited, Neighbor-1) ++ [true | lists:sublist(Visited, Neighbor+1, N-Neighbor-1)],

                                    end

                        end, queue:empty(), Q)
            end
        end, false, lists:seq(0, N-1))
        andalso
        lists:all(
            fun(I) ->
                nums[I] == Sorted[I]
            end, lists:seq(0, N-1))
    ).

返回可以使数组按 **非递减** 顺序排序的最大值 `k`（允许进行任意次这样的交换）。如果 `nums` 已经是有序的，返回 0。

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,3,2,1]

**输出：**1

**解释：**

选择 `k = 1`。交换 `nums[1] = 3` 和 `nums[3] = 1`，因为 `nums[1] AND nums[3] == 1`，从而得到一个排序后的排列：`[0, 1, 2, 3]`。

**示例 2：**

**输入：**nums = [0,1,3,2]

**输出：**2

**解释：**

**示例 3：**

**输入：**nums = [3,2,1,0]

**输出：**0

**解释：**

只有当 `k = 0` 时，才能进行排序，因为没有更大的 `k` 能够满足 `nums[i] AND nums[j] == k` 的交换条件。

```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> integer().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Graph = build_graph(nums, N),
    NumToIndices = build_num_to_indices(nums, N),
    PossibleKs = get_possible_ks(NumToIndices),
    SortedNums = lists:sort(nums),
    check_max_k(PossibleKs, SortedNums, Graph, N).

build_graph(nums, N) ->
    Graph = lists:map(fun(_) -> [] end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Idx, Acc) ->
            lists:foldl(
                fun(Jdx, Acc2) ->
                    AndResult = erlang:bitwise_and(nums[Idx], nums[Jdx]),
                    if
                        AndResult >= 0 ->
                            Graph1 = lists:map(
                                fun(I) ->
                                    case I of
                                        Idx -> lists:append([Jdx], Acc2[I]);
                                        Jdx -> lists:append([Idx], Acc2[I]);
                                        _ -> Acc2[I]
                                    end
                                end, lists:seq(0, N-1)
                            ),
                            Graph1;
                        true ->
                            Acc2
                    end
                end, Acc, lists:seq(Idx+1, N-1))
        end, Graph, lists:seq(0, N-1)).

build_num_to_indices(nums, N) ->
    NumToIndices = dict:from_list(
        lists:map(
            fun(Num) ->
                Indices = lists:filter(fun(I) -> nums[I] == Num end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
                {Num, Indices}
            end, lists:seq(0, N-1))
    ),
    NumToIndices.

get_possible_ks(NumToIndices) ->
    PossibleKs = dict:keys(NumToIndices),
    lists:sort(PossibleKs, fun(A, B) -> A > B end).

check_max_k(PossibleKs, SortedNums, Graph, N) ->
    case lists:reverse(PossibleKs) of
        [] -> 0;
        Ks ->
            case check_k(Ks, SortedNums, Graph, N) of
                true -> lists:last(Ks);
                false -> check_max_k(lists:reverse(lists:tl(PossibleKs)), SortedNums, Graph, N)
            end
    end.

check_k(Ks, SortedNums, Graph, N) ->
    Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(0, N-1)),
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            case Visited[I] of
                true -> true;
                false ->
                    Q = queue:from_list([I]),
                    queue:foldl(
                        fun(Node, Acc) ->
                            lists:foreach(
                                fun(Neighbor) ->
                                    case Visited[Neighbor] of
                                        false ->
                                            Visited1 = lists:sublist_replace(Visited, true, Neighbor, 1),
                                            queue:in(Neighbor, Acc)
                                    end
                                end, Acc, Graph(Node))
                        end, queue:out(Q), Visited)
            end
        end, Visited).
```
